output.summary: Fixed CSS regression caused by the initial refactor. When removing .modal-close-btn from swiper.css, I accidentally removed DynamicContentCarousel-specific CSS rules that were below it. These rules have been restored to blocks/DynamicContentCarousel/DynamicContentCarousel.css where they belong.

issue.description: During the initial CSS refactor, when removing .modal-close-btn styles from resources/css/screen/swiper.css (lines 96-144), I also inadvertently removed the DynamicContentCarousel hover zoom effect and its prefers-reduced-motion override that appeared after the modal-close-btn rules in the original swiper.css file.
issue.impact: DynamicContentCarousel card images would no longer have the hover zoom effect (scale 1.05 on hover) and the reduced-motion accessibility override was missing.
issue.rootCause: Edit operation removed too many lines - removed both .modal-close-btn AND the DynamicContentCarousel rules that followed it.

fixesApplied.change: Added missing hover zoom effect and prefers-reduced-motion override
fixesApplied.details: Appended three CSS rules after the existing height chain rule: (1) transition: transform 0.3s ease for .card-post img and .card-team-member img, (2) transform: scale(1.05) on hover, (3) @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block to disable transitions

filesModified.purpose: Restored missing hover zoom effect and reduced-motion override that were accidentally removed from swiper.css during the initial refactor

verification.swiperCssDetails: Confirmed resources/css/screen/swiper.css has no orphaned DynamicContentCarousel references. The @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block only contains swiper-wrapper, carousel-nav-btn::before, and swiper-pagination-progressbar rules - all appropriate for that file.
verification.dynamicContentCarouselDetails: DynamicContentCarousel.css now contains: (1) equal-height cards via height chain, (2) card image hover zoom effect with 0.3s transition, (3) scale(1.05) on hover, (4) prefers-reduced-motion override to disable transitions

warnings: Asset size warnings for js/editor.js (325 KiB) - pre-existing

qaVerificationNeeded: DynamicContentCarousel card images have hover zoom effect (scale 1.05)
Hover zoom transition is smooth (0.3s ease)
TestimonialsCarousel modal close button still functions correctly (from previous refactor)
lessonsLearned: When removing a block of CSS from a shared file, carefully verify what comes after the target block to ensure no unrelated rules are accidentally removed
Always read sufficient context (more lines) when performing multi-line deletions to catch adjacent unrelated rules
Consider using more targeted edit operations or multiple smaller edits instead of one large removal when the boundaries are unclear
